name: Dans Limo Inc
recent_news: No web presence found; appears to be a small single-vehicle livery/limo operator in Countryside, IL, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate: 3 employees, ~$227K revenue limo operator with no evidence of school district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Likely Cook County livery/ICC carrier only.

name: Easy Way Transportation Inc
recent_news: No corporate website or news found; West Side Chicago address suggests micro-livery or paratransit operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate: 3-employee Chicago micro-operator with no district contract footprint and no fleet evidence. Below platform scale and outside yellow-bus segment.

name: Embassy Limousine
recent_news: Founded 1997 by retired CPD Sergeant Benny Pambuku; positioned as elite chauffeur service near O'Hare. Related entity Executive Secure also operated by Pambuku. No school-bus services.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate: pure executive/corporate limo and security chauffeur business with no student transportation. Wrong segment entirely.

name: Family Transportation
recent_news: No corporate web presence found; small South Holland operator with no documented school district contracts. South suburban Cook County area served by larger operators (Cook-Illinois, Alltown, Latino Express).
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate: 3-employee micro-operator, no documented fleet or district footprint, sub-scale relative to Summit's tuck-in threshold.

name: Faye Limousine Svc Inc
recent_news: No web presence; Des Plaines School District 62 transportation is contracted to First Student, not to Faye. Appears to be a residential-address micro-livery operator.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate: 3-employee limo service with no school district contracts (D62 served by First Student). Wrong segment and sub-scale.
